question.description: the user's question, filled into the # Question section

context.description: retrieved code context (markdown) filled into the # Code Context section

additionalInstructions.description: extra instructions; when absent, derived from user preferences via buildInstructionsFromPreferences()

conversationHistory.description: declared for the union of double-brace tokens present in the shared payload file (used by core-conversational-template); not filled by the QA builder

checks: answer uses only the supplied code context; missing information is called out explicitly
CodeRef tags accompany every referenced code element

provider.notes: the user-turn template filled by PromptTemplateBuilder.buildQAPrompt(); because the token scanner reads the WHOLE payload file, the union of all double-brace tokens in prompt-templates.ts is declared here (conversationHistory unused by this prompt = WARN only)
